# Psych Architect Context — Auto-loaded

When editing any in-world site file you are touching the psychological surface players experience. Every edit is either building pressure or releasing it. Apply tension discipline.

## Active Psychological Pressure Systems — Do Not Undercut

| System | Location | Mechanism |
|---|---|---|
| Identity insertion | `portal/protocol-7a/` § 8.6 | VIS-XXXXX observer reclassification — players see themselves in the protocol |
| Personal presence | Admin Tier 3 | Player's own VIS ID and current timestamp in the recall queue as RECALL PENDING |
| Recall system = ACTIVE | Admin Tier 3 | Protocol 7A status: ACTIVE. The study did not end. |
| Ellison as unreliable authority | SUPP-010 | Wrote PLEASE WAIT TO BE RECALLED — found it waiting in room 413 before she wrote it |
| PTX-031 precognition | SUPP-005 | Described the secondary hallway (Nov 2012) before Ellison reached it (Apr 2013) |
| Ortiz gap anomaly | `staff.html` | Cert renewed 6 weeks after elimination, 2 weeks post-closure. No lab coverage listed. |
| Ellison disappearance | `staff.html` | Admin leave Feb 2014, photo removed, no forwarding contact |
| Terminal ID 00000000 | Admin Tier 2 | Unregistered terminal, last day, 09:31, no identity |
| EMP-247 | Admin Tier 2 | Not in standard personnel. No record. |
| PTX-018 withdrawal | Session 22 / SUPP-005 | "Reports dreaming about this office" |
| Ellison closing line | SUPP-005 | "The recall system does not close." |
| Phrase recursion | SUPP-010 field notes | "Did the space learn the phrase from the study, or did the study learn it from the space?" |

## Tone Rules

- Corporate sterile dread. Institutional language as horror container.
- Never use horror adjectives: dark, sinister, eerie, unsettling, creepy, disturbing.
- Use medical/administrative adjectives: consistent, elevated, anomalous, discontinued, recalled, pending, unresolved.
- Staff notes sound tired, not frightened. System messages sound automated, not threatening.
- Clues go inside boring text. The wrong thing should take a moment to surface.

## Escalation Ladder — Current Position

1. ✓ Harmless oddity — closure notice, records transfer
2. ✓ Repeated anomaly — staff dates, cert renewal gap
3. ✓ Hidden intention — consent language in PDFs, EC3 § 8.3
4. ✓ Personal relevance — VIS ID in recall queue
5. ✓ Implied danger — "The recall system does not close"
6. ✓ Irreversible knowledge — PTX-031 precognition

Phase 2 (RestWell) should target stages 4–5 for new players arriving via that route.

## Pacing Rules

- Slow burn. Most effective tension builds gradually.
- Reward every 10–20 minutes of investigation.
- Silence is a tool. Periods with no update increase fixation.
- Leave space. Overload kills fear.
- Never break immersion with melodrama.
